## Purpose
This file serves as a configuration for the DiffDoc tool, specifying how it should operate in a local environment.

## User-Visible Behavior
When executed, the configuration allows the DiffDoc tool to run with the specified command and settings, enabling users to generate documentation based on the defined parameters.

## Business Rules
The configuration specifies that the DiffDoc command is enabled, has a defined timeout of 10 seconds, and uses a local type setting.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
The input to this configuration is the command array and settings defined within the JSON structure. The output is the execution of the DiffDoc command as specified.

## Side Effects
Executing the command defined in this configuration may result in the generation of documentation files or logs, depending on the behavior of the DiffDoc tool.

## Error And Edge Cases
If the specified command or configuration file is missing or incorrect, the execution may fail, leading to errors in generating documentation.

## Dependencies
The configuration references an external schema for validation but does not specify any additional dependencies.

## Operational Notes
The configuration is designed for local execution and has a timeout setting that may affect performance if the command takes longer than expected.
